## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run verify` passes (lint + typecheck + test + build)
- [ ] Pure logic changes are covered by tests in `tests/`
- [ ] `shared/` stays DOM-free / Node-testable
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or config changed
